headline: IXC climbed 52% in a year but income investors face a reckoning
summary: The iShares Global Energy ETF (NYSEARCA:IXC) pays a semi-annual distribution that swings between feast and famine depending on crude oil prices. IXC’s latest payment of $0.848062 in December 2025 brought the trailing yield to roughly 3.7%, a number that looks reliable until you remember the fund cut its June 2025 payout to $0.696557 from $0.897665 ... IXC climbed 52% in a year but income investors face a reckoning

headline: Occidental Petroleum vs Exxon Mobil: The Better Oil Titan For 2026
summary: Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) and Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) just closed earnings chapters that read like opposite playbooks. Occidental wrapped fiscal 2025 by selling its chemicals arm to Berkshire and shrinking into a focused driller. Exxon opened Q1 2026 by loading its first Golden Pass LNG cargo and buying back nearly $5 billion in stock. With WTI ... Occidental Petroleum vs Exxon Mobil: The Better Oil Titan For 2026

headline: Exxon Mobil’s Haimara Project In Guyana And What It Means For XOM
summary: Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) is advancing its ninth major oil project in Guyana, the Haimara development, within the Stabroek block. The Haimara project will undergo a full Environmental Impact Assessment, signaling extensive regulatory review. This move expands Exxon Mobil’s Guyanese portfolio, which the company views as a key part of its long term production plans. For investors watching NYSE:XOM, the Haimara development adds another large project to Exxon Mobil’s core offshore Guyana business,...
